title: Always Blue Axolotl
description: This makes Every Axolotl to the rare one
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/759f48118e012dc97e292ab0b3899f0893acb5cd.png)

### Always Blue Axolotl

This texture pack replaces all normal axolotl colors with the blue _"rare"_ axolotl texture.

Perfect to trick your friends with your blue axolotl


<details>
<summary>What versions?</summary>
Works on Minecraft Java Edition 1.21+
</details>



![Axolotl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58b4b899cdb65faff89b3fad20c095706d180862_0.webp)
